page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 45 physical cores and 90 dedicated vCPUs with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 720 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, consisting of eight local NVMe SSDs that deliver a total capacity of 3216 GB.

In benchmark evaluations, this server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests, PassMark CPU scores, and software compilation with Clang. Cryptographic capabilities are also highly rated, with the PassMark CPU encryption test placing in the top 10%, supported by hardware-accelerated instruction sets such as AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. Memory bandwidth is strong for read operations, though large-block write operations perform at an average level.

The combination of high memory capacity, dedicated CPU resources, and fast local NVMe storage makes this instance highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, and data processing pipelines. Redis SET operations achieve top-tier performance at 118.1 million operations per second. While the instance lacks a dedicated GPU, it delivers strong performance in CPU-based LLM inference for medium-sized models, though text generation speeds for larger models remain average.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server featuring 90 dedicated vCPUs and 720 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It includes 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across eight drives. The instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for PassMark CPU and stress-ng multi-core benchmarks, alongside strong memory read bandwidth. It is highly optimized for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and large-scale caching, as demonstrated by top-tier Redis SET performance.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server with 90 vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd features 90 vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB local NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server with dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 90 dedicated vCPUs and 720 GB of RAM.
Includes 3216 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across eight drives.
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and software compilation speeds.
Achieves top-tier Redis SET throughput of 118.1 million operations per second.
Best suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and data processing.
